summary.summary: Modifies SnoozeAlertsSheetView.swift to provide an in-list way to end a currently active snooze by replacing an explicit "End Snooze" button with a swipe action and associated destructive action. The change series initially added a centered "Undo Snooze" button that called undoSnooze/applySnooze(for: 0) (commit:6d1744d116c8, diff:81a7b90c0768). That button was renamed/simplified to "End Snooze" and the implementation was switched to endSnooze (commit:b8eed9dd7371, diff:81a7b90c0768). The explicit button was then replaced by swipeActions (both edges originally, then restricted to trailing edge) using a reusable endSnoozeAction view (commit:785dcbd32cd9, commit:d0cb803f6449, diff:81a7b90c0768). Finally, the UI footer and swipe action gained a symbol and the footer text was adjusted to indicate the swipe gesture; the destructive action label/system image was updated (commit:59bce547ac2b, file:f9749fdebc6e, diff:81a7b90c0768). The PR was merged (commit:502709a5434f, pr:nightscout/Trio#1293).
summary.userFacingImpact: When a snooze is active, the snooze row now exposes a destructive "End Snooze" swipe action (left/leading-to-trailing behavior was finalized as trailing/left swipe in the commits) instead of a centered button; the footer displays an icon and text instructing the user to swipe to end snooze (commit:785dcbd32cd9, commit:d0cb803f6449, commit:59bce547ac2b, file:f9749fdebc6e). The action invokes the existing applySnooze(for: 0) call to end the snooze (commit:6d1744d116c8, commit:b8eed9dd7371, diff:81a7b90c0768). Evidence in the supplied changes shows only UI/interaction and label/icon updates; no other behavioral changes outside ending the snooze were shown in the provided diffs (file:f9749fdebc6e, diff:81a7b90c0768).
